Handheld modern social-first product photography with tactile editorial energy, SCARLETT wearing light summer beach attire seated at a crisp white vanity table before her microphone in a minimal clean studio, body angled forward with hand hovering mid-reach toward the coral lipstick bullet resting in its open minimal packaging and fingers lightly tensed to lift and turn the smooth matte case, bright natural window light flooding the scene and casting clean directional shadows across white surfaces and soft neutral tones, shallow depth of field with warm glow highlighting skin and product details, slightly above eye-level angle capturing the anticipatory moment with natural micro-movement.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING - Bright natural window light floods a crisp white vanity
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
